message:
style: rustfmt formatting fixes and cleanup after field removal

- body_bridge: flatten nested match arm indentation
- encoding: reorder imports, reformat multi-line assert! macros
- health: reformat method chain in watched_status_and_version
- state: clean up blank lines and fix assert_eq! calls left over
  from decision_seq/replay_hash removal
- filter: remove extraneous blank lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
